daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today. You're giving main character energy—trust your gut instincts and let your natural magnetism do the heavy lifting. The universe is backing your moves.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your aura shift. Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language rn. Stop overthinking and let people see the real you—that's what they're actually attracted to.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are about to make waves. Don't downplay your ideas in meetings; your perspective has weight. This is a good day to pitch something you've been sitting on or level up your skill set.
daily.health: Your body's asking for more intentional movement today. Whether it's a walk, yoga, or dancing around your room, tune in to what feels good rather than what feels like an obligation. Your energy flows where attention goes.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is giving you permission to shed what no longer serves. Mars is pushing you toward authenticity, so trust your gut when something feels off. Expect clarity by midweek that changes your whole perspective.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering softly this week—if you're coupled up, it's time for real talk. Single? Someone intriguing might slide into your orbit, but don't rush. Your vibe is magnetic rn, so just exist and let things unfold naturally.
weekly.career: Your ideas are sharper than usual, and people are actually listening. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Don't overthink it—your instincts are literally your superpower right now.
weekly.health: Your energy is asking you to slow down and actually rest, not just doom-scroll. Try something grounding this week—walks, journaling, whatever feels like a reset. Your nervous system will thank you for the pause.
